note: Reference phrasebook + dialect/variant data from the canonical Six Sacred Tongues wordlist. Deliberately has NO 'tongue'/'words' key so tongue_lexicon.load_full() SKIPS it -- phrases are multi-word and would never match the single-token classifier. This is for prose/translation + lore, not classification. The single-word vocabulary is already in the per-tongue lexicon files.

kor_aelin_sacred_phrases.Thul'medan kess'ara: the spiral turns, knowledge grows (general blessing)

nal_kythraelin_7th.note: Emergent 7th 'unified' tongue -- paradox grammar where contradiction is generative. NOT one of the six governance tongues; lore only.
nal_kythraelin_7th.sample: Vel'sek nav'aya kor'sil sil'ael. -- 'Invite-severance difference-learn heart-together unity-eternal.'

dialects.shadow_malzeth_irun: Corrupts proper Kor'aelin: 'vel -> 'dom (domination); 'sil -> 'sep (separation). e.g. Thul'medan kess'ara -> Thul'medan'zar kess'ara (spiral-bridges-dimensions, knowledge-dominates).
dialects.sil_speak: Simplified Kor'aelin for children -- reduced particles, simpler grammar. e.g. 'Zara vel thul' = 'Zara wants to grow'.
dialects.future_steampunk: Kael's era -- tech integration, e.g. 'Maeji'zar gear' = magic-dimensional technology.
